HGSS.094.0000:
Welcome to the Battle Tower!\f
I am your guide to the Single
and Double Battle Rooms.\f
HGSS.094.0001:
Would you like to take the
Battle Room challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0002: We hope to see you again!
HGSS.094.0003:
The Battle Tower is a facility for Single
or Double Battle challenges.\f
Once entered, your challenge lasts
until you lose.\f
In Single Battle format, you enter with
three Pokémon.\f
In Double Battle format, you enter with
four Pokémon.\f
The battles are held in Battle Rooms,
of which there are many in the tower.\f
In each of the Battle Rooms, seven
Trainers await your challenge.\f
If you manage to defeat all seven,
you will earn Battle Points (BP).\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
Please be aware of that!\f
HGSS.094.0004:
Which Battle Room would you like?
Single or Double? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0008:
Please select the Pokémon you wish
to enter.\f
HGSS.094.0009: Your Pokémon must all be different.\f
HGSS.094.0010: Held items must all be different.\f
HGSS.094.0011: I will now show you to the Battle Room.
HGSS.094.0012:
Congratulations!
You’ve beaten all seven Trainers!\f
HGSS.094.0013:
Congratulations!
You’ve beaten the Tower Tycoon!\f
We present you with these Battle
Points in recognition of your talent!\f
[0103,0000,0000] received
[0132,0001,0000] BP!\f
HGSS.094.0014:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.094.0015: We hope to see you again.
HGSS.094.0016:
We’ve been waiting for you!\f
Before entering a Battle Room, your
progress will be saved. Please wait.
HGSS.094.0019:
Excuse me!\f
You didn’t save before you quit your
challenge last time.\f
Because of that, you have been
disqualified from your challenge!\f
HGSS.094.0020:
Welcome to the Battle Tower!\f
I am your guide to the Multi
Battle Rooms.\f
HGSS.094.0021:
Would you like to take the Multi
Battle Room challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0023:
The Battle Tower’s Multi Battle Rooms
are for Multi Battles with a partner.\f
To enter, join another Trainer and
compete with two Pokémon each.\f
Inside the tower is a room named the
Battle Salon where you can meet\r
other Trainers.\f
There, you can find a Trainer to act
as your partner in the Multi Battles.\f
You can also partner up with a friend
over wireless communications.\f
Once you have partnered up, you will
be shown to a Multi Battle Room.\f
In the Multi Battle Room, seven
tag teams await your challenge.\f
If you manage to defeat all seven
teams, you will earn Battle Points.\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
Also, if you are on a tag team with
a friend, you may not interrupt\r
your challenge.\f
HGSS.094.0026:
Would you like to communicate with
a friend and form a tag team? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0027:
One Trainer should select
“BECOME LEADER.”\f
The other Trainer must select
“JOIN GROUP.” [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0032:
I’ll direct you to your Multi Battle
Room now.
HGSS.094.0033:
Both Trainers have chosen the
Pokémon [0100,0000,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
HGSS.094.0034:
Both Trainers have chosen the Pokémon
[0100,0000,0000] and [0100,0001,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.\f
HGSS.094.0035: I will now show you to the Battle Salon.\f
HGSS.094.0036:
Welcome to the Battle Tower!\f
I am your guide to the Wi-Fi Battle
Rooms.\f
HGSS.094.0037:
Would you like to take the Wi-Fi
Battle Room challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0038:
The Battle Tower’s Wi-Fi Battle Rooms
are places to conduct battles over\r
Nintendo Wi-Fi Connection.\f
As a result, you will be battling
Trainers from around the world.\f
Inside the Battle Tower, there are
many Battle Rooms.\f
In each of the Battle Rooms, seven
Trainers await your challenge.\f
If you manage to defeat all seven,
you will earn Battle Points.\f
Depending on how you do, you may
even become the room’s leader!\f
Also, the Wi-Fi Battle Rooms are
operated on a ranking system.\f
Trainers will go up in rank if they
keep winning Wi-Fi Battles.\f
Contrarily, their rankings could go
down if they lose consistently.\f
To raise your rank, keep winning,
especially against tougher Trainers.\f
If you want to interrupt your
challenge, please save the game.\f
If you don’t save, you will be
disqualified from your challenge.\f
HGSS.094.0039: We hope to see you again!
HGSS.094.0047:
OK. I’ll direct you to your Battle Room
now.\f
Are you ready? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0048:
Would you like to save and interrupt
your challenge? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0052:
I’ve downloaded the Rank [0133,0000,0000] Battle
Room [0134,0001,0000]’s past leader history.\f
Please confirm it on the Performance
Monitor next to me.
HGSS.094.0054:
Congratulations!
You’ve beaten all seven Trainers!\f
HGSS.094.0055:
[0103,0000,0000], you have also been
promoted to Rank [0133,0001,0000]!\f
HGSS.094.0056:
Saving...
Don’t turn off the power.
HGSS.094.0057:
Would you like to send these
results using Nintendo WFC? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0058:
For your 7-win streak, we present
you with the BP you have earned!\f
[0103,0000,0000] received
[0132,0001,0000] BP.\f
HGSS.094.0060:
Your results were sent out using
Nintendo WFC!\f
HGSS.094.0061:
It’s good to see you back.\f
Your previous results were not sent
out using Nintendo WFC.\f
Would you like to send them now? [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0065:
Unfortunately, you have been
demoted to Rank [0133,0000,0000]...\f
HGSS.094.0069:
Your record will be saved.
Please wait.
HGSS.094.0070:
Congratulations on achieving Rank [0133,0000,0000].
Your winning Pokémon team has won\r
special Ribbons for this feat!
HGSS.094.0073:
Congratulations on achieving your
50-win streak.\r
Your winning Pokémon team has won\r
special Ribbons for this feat!
HGSS.094.0074:
As you can see, Battle Frontier is a
great facility.\f
You know what?\f
Apparently, similar facilities are
available outside of Johto.
HGSS.094.0075:
Thank you for playing!\f
Your Pokémon will be restored to
full...\r
Oh my!\f
I’m not on duty today.
I’m just here to enjoy myself.
HGSS.094.0076:
Me?\f
I just made a debut as an Idol!\r
I haven’t gotten much work yet.\f
So whenever I have time, I come here
to battle Pokémon.
HGSS.094.0077:
I trained my little guy till we
couldn’t take any more.\f
He’s going to do a 50-win streak
for sure...\f
Right, PIKACHU?
HGSS.094.0079:
I’ve always loved this kind of
see-through elevator since I\r
was young.\f
Or not!\f
When I was young, this kind of
elevator was unheard of!
HGSS.094.0080:
Tee hee!
All the Trainers around us look\r
so pathetic!\f
...Actually, that’s the kind of mind-set
that makes you lose with one hit!\f
Don’t let your guard down, PIKACHU!
HGSS.094.0082:
Congratulations on achieving
a 50-win streak!\f
The Pokémon on your team will be
provided with commemorative Ribbons.
HGSS.094.0083:
Congratulations on advancing to
Rank [0132,0000,0000]!\f
The Pokémon on your team will be
provided with commemorative Ribbons.
HGSS.094.0084:
Congratulations on defeating
the Tower Tycoon!\r
The Pokémon on your team will be\r
provided with commemorative Ribbons.
HGSS.094.0085:
Congratulations!\f
In honor of your victory, we present
you this commemorative print!\f
HGSS.094.0086:
The Gold Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.094.0087:
The Silver Print was added to
[0103,0000,0000]’s Vs. Recorder!\f
HGSS.094.0088:
Congratulations on achieving your
[0134,0000,0000]-win streak!\f
Please accept this trophy for your
fantastic achievement!\r
We’ll send it to your home.\f
HGSS.094.0089:
...Uh-oh... You’ve run out of room
for decoration goods.\f
Please make room, and come back
for your prize.
HGSS.094.0090:
Both Trainers have chosen the Pokémon
[0100,0000,0000] and [0100,0001,0000].\f
Please confer with the other Trainer
and choose different Pokémon.

kinds of items.\f
Eggs are not allowed to enter.\f
Please come see me when you are ready.

HGSS.094.0110:
Thank you so much for participating!
Please come again!
HGSS.094.0111:
There doesn’t appear to be any
data yet...
HGSS.094.0112:
DS Wireless Communications will
be launched. [0200,0000]
HGSS.094.0113: We look forward to your next visit.\f
HGSS.094.0114:
You can call me the Judge.\f
Heheh, it’s actually not my real name,
but that’s what everyone calls me.\f
It’s because of this weird power I
have. It’s a gift, really.\f
I can discern--judge you can say--the
overall potential of individual Pokémon.\f
If you’d like, I could judge the
intriguing potential of your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.094.0115:
If you’d like, I could judge the
intriguing potential of your Pokémon.\f
HGSS.094.0116:
...Oh.
You don’t need me to judge. I get it.
HGSS.094.0117:
Judge an Egg?!
That’s a tall order even for me.\f
HGSS.094.0118:
I see, I see...\f
This Pokémon’s potential is decent all
around.\f
That’s my determination, and it’s final.\f
HGSS.094.0119:
I see, I see...\f
This Pokémon’s potential is above
average overall.\f
That’s my determination, and it’s final.\f
HGSS.094.0120:
I see, I see...\f
This Pokémon has relatively superior
potential overall.\f
That’s my determination, and it’s final.\f
HGSS.094.0121:
I see, I see...\f
This Pokémon has outstanding potential
overall.\f
That’s my determination, and it’s final.\f
HGSS.094.0122:
Incidentally, I would say the best
potential lies in its HP.\f
HGSS.094.0123:
Incidentally, I would say the best
potential lies in its Attack stat.\f
HGSS.094.0124:
Incidentally, I would say the best
potential lies in its Defense stat.\f
HGSS.094.0125:
Incidentally, I would say the best
potential lies in its Sp. Atk stat.\f
HGSS.094.0126:
Incidentally, I would say the best
potential lies in its Sp. Def stat.\f
HGSS.094.0127:
Incidentally, I would say the best
potential lies in its Speed stat.\f
HGSS.094.0128:
It’s rather decent in that regard.
That’s how I judged it.
HGSS.094.0129:
It’s very good in that regard.
That’s how I judged it.
HGSS.094.0130:
It’s fantastic in that regard.
That’s how I judged it.
HGSS.094.0131:
It can’t be better in that regard.
That’s how I judged it.
HGSS.094.0132:
A Ribbon will be awarded to the
participating Pokémon!
